column1: # HoopsValue - blocked signings. Stop the model from signing a specific player to a
# specific team when it makes no positional/roster sense (e.g. a team already deep at a
# position). The blocked player is dropped from that team and re-routes elsewhere; he is
# never sent back to the blocked team.
#   team   = 3-letter abbreviation that should NOT sign the player
#   player = the free agent the model wrongly placed there
